metadata.style: NYC Old-Law Tenement Walk-up (East Village / Lower East Side)
metadata.description: A modernized 1-bed conversion of a pre-war Old-Law NYC dumbbell tenement — Lower East Side / East Village typology. Linear railroad arrangement: street-facing living room (only true window), middle kitchen with original air-shaft window, rear bedroom looking onto courtyard, and an internal bathroom retrofitted from the original hallway WC. 5-storey walk-up with no elevator. NYC code §27-2074 minimum 60 sqft per living room. Sources: NYC Old-Law Tenement act + Village Preservation tenement typology archive.

rooms.name: Living Room
rooms.notes: Front street-facing — only true daylight per code

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.notes: Internal bath — retrofitted (originally toilet was in hallway)
